about.title: More than just an app, <highlight>CoachMe</highlight> is a community.
about.description: <highlight>CoachMe</highlight> was founded on the belief that everyone deserves access to world-class sport expertise. Our platform connects you with dedicated professionals who tailor every workout to your unique journey, ensuring that your wellness goals are always within reach.

access.title: Direct Access
access.description: Chat and coordinate directly with your coach without intermediaries.

expertise.title: Verified Expertise
expertise.description: Every coach on <highlight>CoachMe</highlight> is thoroughly vetted for certifications and quality.

growth.title: Growth Focused
growth.description: We provide the tools for both clients and coaches to track progress and succeed.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose <highlight>CoachMe</highlight>
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Discover the advantages of training with the best coaches in Cameroon.

certified.title: Certified Professionals
certified.description: All coaches are thoroughly vetted and certified. Train with confidence knowing you're working with qualified professionals.

community.title: Local Community
community.description: Find coaches in your area across Cameroon. Build lasting relationships with professionals who understand your local context.

flexible.title: Flexible Scheduling
flexible.description: Book sessions that fit your busy schedule. Our coaches offer flexible timing to accommodate your professional lifestyle.

disciplines.title: Explore Our <highlight>Disciplines</highlight>
disciplines.subtitle: Connecting you with the best sport professionals across top domains.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your <highlight>Wellness Journey?</highlight>
cta.description: Join thousands of professionals who have transformed their health with our certified coaches.

testimonials.title: What Our <highlight>Community</highlight> Says
testimonials.subtitle: Discover how <highlight>CoachMe</highlight> has helped people achieve their sport goals through professional guidance.

items.content: CoachMe transformed my sport journey. The personalized attention and expert guidance from my coach helped me achieve results I never thought possible.
items.author: Sarah Johnson

items.content: Finding the right coach was so easy. The platform is intuitive and the quality of trainers is top-notch. Highly recommend!
items.author: Mark Thompson

items.content: I love the flexibility and the range of disciplines. I've tried multiple coaches and each one has been incredibly professional and supportive.
items.author: Elena Rodriguez

items.content: As a busy professional, I needed flexible coaching that fit my schedule. CoachMe delivered exactly that. My coach understands my goals and keeps me motivated.
items.author: David Chen

items.content: The community aspect is amazing. My coach not only trains me but also connects me with other clients. It's more than sport—it's a lifestyle change.
items.author: Amina Kamara

hero.title: Empowering Your <highlight>sport Journey</highlight>
hero.subtitle: CoachMe is more than a platform; we are a movement dedicated to making professional coaching accessible to everyone in Cameroon.

mission.title: Our <highlight>Mission</highlight>
mission.content: To bridge the gap between world-class sport expertise and individuals seeking transformation. We empower coaches to shine and clients to achieve their healthiest selves.

vision.title: Our <highlight>Vision</highlight>
vision.content: To become the leading digital ecosystem for health and wellness in Africa, starting with a vibrant, professional community in Cameroon.

story.title: Our <highlight>Story</highlight>
story.intro: CoachMe was born from a simple observation: the incredible talent of sport professionals in Cameroon wasn't reaching the people who needed it most.

2023.title: The Spark
2023.description: Inspired by the local sport scene, we began conceptualizing a platform that removes barriers and builds trust.

2024.title: Building the Bridge
2024.description: Our team of developers and sport experts joined forces to create a seamless experience for both coaches and clients.

today.title: Launch & Growth
today.description: Official launch in Cameroon, connecting hundreds of certified professionals with a growing community.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We only partner with the best, ensuring every coach is certified and vetted.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Professional coaching shouldn't be a luxury. We make it reachable for everyone.

community.title: Community
community.description: Success is better when shared. We foster a supportive ecosystem for growth.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Direct communication and fair, clear processes are at our heart.

hero.title: Get in <highlight>Touch</highlight>
hero.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about features, pricing, or need a demo, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

q1.question: How do I book a coach?
q1.answer: You can browse our list of certified coaches, view their profiles, and book a session directly through their calendar.

q2.question: Is there a free trial?

q3.question: How do I become a coach?
q3.answer: Visit our 'Become a Coach' page to apply. We vet all applicants to ensure high quality.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: At CoachMe, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

sections.title: The Data We Collect
sections.content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
items: Identity Data: name, username or similar identifier.
Contact Data: email address and telephone numbers.
Technical Data: IP address, login data, browser type and version.
Profile Data: your interests, preferences, and sport goals.

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
sections.content: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
items: To register you as a new customer.
To facilitate connections between coaches and clients.
To manage our relationship with you.
To improve our website, services, and user experience.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed.

sections.title: Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you disagree with any part of the terms, then you may not access the service.

sections.title: User Accounts
sections.content: When you create an account with us, you must provide information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account.

sections.title: Prohibited Activities
sections.content: You agree not to engage in any of the following prohibited activities:
items: Copying, distributing, or disclosing any part of the service in any medium.
Using any automated system, including robots or spiders.
Attempting to interfere with the system integrity or security.
Impersonating another person or misrepresenting your affiliation.

sections.title: Coaching Disclaimer
sections.content: CoachMe is a platform that connects coaches and clients. We do not provide medical advice. Always consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new sport program.

sections.title: What are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site.

sections.title: How We Use Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies for the following purposes:
items: Authentication: To recognize you when you visit our services.
Security: To protect your data and our services.
Preferences: To remember your settings and preferences.
Analytics: To understand how you use our platform.

sections.title: Managing Cookies
sections.content: Most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings preferences. However, if you limit the ability of websites to set cookies, you may worsen your overall user experience.
